ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow collapsing/expanding single-column Anki tables in preview and source view.
ast.target: 允许在预览和源码视图中折叠/展开单列表格。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, newly rendered single-column Anki tables start collapsed.
ast.target: 启用后，新渲染的单列表格默认折叠。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable answer table toggles
ast.target: 启用答案表格切换

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Collapse tables by default
ast.target: 默认折叠表格

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: AnkiConnect connection failed. Is Anki open with AnkiConnect installed?
ast.target: AnkiConnect 连接失败。Anki 是否已打开并安装 AnkiConnect？

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to retrieve deck list from Anki.
ast.target: 无法从 Anki 获取牌组列表。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: AnkiConnect did not return a valid note ID.
ast.target: AnkiConnect 未返回有效的笔记 ID。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to fetch note info from Anki.
ast.target: 无法从 Anki 获取笔记信息。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not find managed notes in Anki.
ast.target: 在 Anki 中找不到受管理的笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Answer table toggles are disabled in settings.
ast.target: 设置中已禁用答案表切换。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: AnkiConnect is not available. Please make sure Anki is running and AnkiConnect is installed.
ast.target: AnkiConnect 不可用。请确保 Anki 正在运行并已安装 AnkiConnect。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Starting vault sync. This may take a while...
ast.target: 正在开始同步库。这可能需要一段时间...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vault sync complete.
ast.target: 库同步完成。

ast.name: name

ast.target: 将当前文件与 Anki 同步

ast.source: Sync entire vault with Anki
ast.target: 与 Anki 同步整个库

ast.name: name

ast.target: 与 Anki 取消同步当前文件

ast.name: name
ast.source: Collapse all Anki card tables on page
ast.target: 折叠页面上所有 Anki 卡片表格

ast.name: name
